creator: sdn@sprintlabs.com
text:
/usr/ports/emulators/linux_base-7
fails on make with:
===>  Installing for linux_base-7.1
kern.fallback_elf_brand: 3 -> 3
glibc-common-2.2.2-10.i386.rpm
file /usr/share/zoneinfo/zone.tab from install of glibc-common-2.2.2-10 conflicts with file from package glibc-2.1.2-11
[...]
file /usr/share/zoneinfo/right/W-SU from install of glibc-common-2.2.2-10 conflicts with file from package glibc-2.1.2-11
file /usr/bin/catchsegv from install of glibc-common-2.2.2-10 conflicts with file from package glibc-2.1.2-11
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/emulators/linux_base-7.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/emulators/linux_base-7.

Fix: 

Fix the port?
Remove the package glibc-2.1.2-11?
I don't know.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/emulators/linux_base-7
make
